# Feature: Runtime snapshot v2 — forms, modals, route observer

<!-- auto-generated by /implement on 2026-07-08 -->

## Intent
Collect richer live UI state: forms, dialogs, disabled/loading, text regions, route changes.

## Preconditions
- `@autoguide/runtime` runs in browser/jsdom test environment
- `scanDom` remains backward compatible entry point

## Happy Path
- [ ] Snapshot includes form fields with labels
- [ ] Snapshot includes open dialogs (`role=dialog`, `aria-modal`)
- [ ] Elements expose `disabled` and `loading` state
- [ ] Visible text regions captured for main content blocks
- [ ] Route observer fires on route change; snapshot records navigation history
- [ ] Inspector resolves selected element via stable `id` matching graph entity pattern

## Edge Cases
- [ ] Empty page yields empty arrays, not errors
- [ ] Shadow DOM skipped gracefully (documented limitation)

## Regression
- [ ] Existing `scanner.test.ts` interactive element test passes
- [ ] InspectorOverlay still works in dev mode

## Assumptions
- MutationObserver API optional; route observer is manual unsubscribe pattern

## Implementation Notes
- `packages/runtime/src/types.ts` — forms, dialogs, textRegions, navigation, entityId on elements
- `packages/runtime/src/scanner.ts` — v2 extraction
- `packages/runtime/src/route-observer.ts` — route observer, snapshot recorder, mutation observer
- Inspector shows `entityId` for graph linking
